description: A discourse marker expressing logical consequence or natural result: 'therefore', 'so'. It presents what follows as the conclusion of what came before, linking whole sentences rather than parts of one.
sound_symbolism: The word begins with 'θ', the thoughtful fricative that requires deliberate tongue placement, suggesting careful consideration. This flows through 'e' into 'la', liquid sounds that connect smoothly, before rounding into 'o'. The whole word flows like logical progression itself—from thoughtful beginning through smooth connection to complete conclusion.
grammatical_notes: As a discourse marker, typically appears sentence-initially to connect whole thoughts, showing logical progression. When sentence-initial, appears after Slot 0 particles but before the subject. Unlike other function words, discourse markers operate at the sentence level, relating entire propositions rather than modifying individual constituents. Example: 'thelao mia wepu' (Therefore, I go).

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The discourse marker embodies dependent origination—nothing arises in isolation but emerges from causes and conditions. 'Thelao' grammaticalizes this wisdom that all phenomena arise from what preceded them.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: By framing consequences as natural flow rather than imposed punishment, 'thelao' enables discussion of results without blame, supporting restorative rather than punitive thinking.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Traditional knowledge systems understand consequence through natural observation—rain brings growth, neglect brings decay. 'Thelao' carries this recognition of natural sequences.
